title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (21), PAGE 208, TITLE (A) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H No. 5575 / 57 OG No. 45, 8092 (November 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3032, June 17, 1961 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (21), PAGE 208, TITLE (A) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (21), page 208, Title (A) of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred and thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"(21) Dumangas Municipal Building, Iloilo

P20,000

"(21a) Dumangas Public Market, Iloilo

40,000

"(21b) Dumangas Public Plaza or Parks, Iloilo

20,000.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1961.
